title: Setu - AI Legal Assistant
description: An AI-powered application designed to make legal assistance accessible in Nepal. Setu generates official legal documents and automatically scans and flags biases in legal texts.

title: Decentralized Blockchain Ledger
description: A lightweight blockchain concept featuring consensus verification and smart contract architecture to manage user identity records securely.

title: ROS2 Autonomous Navigation Rover
description: Orchestrating hardware simulations and pathfinding models using ROS2 (Robot Operating System) for robotics navigation workflows.
